overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player character ascending from an underground transit station into a futuristic neon-lit cityscape. The character explores a downtown district with towering skyscrapers, holographic advertisements, and dense pedestrian activity during the golden hour, featuring prominent blue neon accent lighting and corporate signage.

emerging from dark underground tunnel into daylight city environment

agents.ego_description: climbing concrete stairs from dimly lit underground toward bright surface exit

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in dark clothing descending stairs toward camera

entered.detail: wall-mounted orange LED arrow patterns providing directional guidance
wide concrete stairs with metal edge strips and handrails
intense white light streaming from surface entrance at top of stairs

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a dimly lit underground transit stairwell with orange illuminated arrow tiles on the walls. The camera ascends concrete stairs toward a bright exit, passing a descending pedestrian, and emerges into the daylight of a futuristic city.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic city plaza with corporate architecture

events.description: turning left to survey the stairwell entrance and surrounding plaza architecture

agents.ego_description: emerging into city plaza and turning to observe the architectural surroundings and neon signage

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in bright green pants walking past camera on the right

entered.detail: large red neon corporate logo signage mounted on building facade
tall futuristic tower with reflective glass surface and holographic displays
organic architectural entrance with sweeping curves and integrated blue neon lighting

segments.scene_description: Having emerged from underground, the camera turns left to reveal a futuristic city plaza dominated by a large PETROCHEM neon sign and towering glass skyscrapers. The character approaches a distinctive curved stairwell entrance with blue neon accents while a pedestrian in green pants walks past.

scene_state.functional_zone: illuminated transit stairway with neon accents

events.description: reaching the top landing of the stairs and transitioning to level ground

agents.ego_description: climbing wide stairs with prominent blue neon lighting, passing groups of ascending and descending pedestrians

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians moving up and down the stairs in both directions

entered.detail: horizontal cyan LED strips embedded in the stair structure walls
decorative tropical vegetation planted along the stair railing edges
elevated pedestrian bridge spanning across the top of the stairwell

segments.scene_description: The camera ascends a wide stairway illuminated by striking blue neon light strips, with palm plants lining the right side. Pedestrians move in both directions on the stairs as the camera approaches an overhead walkway at the top, transitioning from the enclosed stairwell to an upper plaza level.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian promenade with digital advertising

events.description: passing under a massive overpass structure with shifting light and shadow patterns
approaching area with direct golden hour sunlight visible between towering buildings

agents.ego_description: strolling along the pedestrian walkway beneath elevated highways, passing various NPCs and digital billboards

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in white jacket and dark skirt walking alongside the camera
person sitting on bench using a handheld device

entered.detail: massive concrete overpass with integrated lighting casting shadows on the walkway
freestanding digital billboard displaying animated advertisements
distinctive bright yellow architectural facade with external staircases
concrete seating areas with people resting along the grassy verge

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows a continuous walk along a covered urban promenade beneath massive elevated highway structures. The path features digital advertising screens, park benches with resting pedestrians, and a distinctive yellow building section. The camera moves through varying light conditions from shadowed overpass areas to sections illuminated by golden hour sunlight streaming between the towering skyscrapers.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a dim underground transit station into the expansive, neon-lit heights of a futuristic city. It begins by ascending a concrete stairwell marked by orange illuminated tiles, moving past a descending pedestrian toward a bright exit that reveals the daylight of a sprawling urban plaza. As the camera emerges, it turns left toward towering glass skyscrapers and a prominent PETROCHEM neon sign before approaching a curved entrance accented with blue neon. The scene then shifts upward as the camera climbs a wide stairway lined with palm plants and striking blue light strips, transitioning from the enclosed stairs to an elevated plaza level. Finally, the movement continues along a covered urban promenade beneath massive highway structures, weaving through digital advertisements and shadowed overpasses into the golden hour sunlight streaming between the skyscrapers.
